name: Dejavu village
description:
An unnamed place where everything comes back the next day.

You can do anything, but when the clock strikes 00:00, everything will fall into place, as it was originally. Will you be able to get out of there or will you stay there? Will you help the others out, or are you on your own? It's up to you, because everything you've been doing all this time, you'll remember perfectly when everyone else forgets.

You are in a small village next to a forest and a river, where there lives: a small happy family of a mother, father, son and two twin daughters; a lonely and sad blacksmith in a small shop; a kind mature shepherd woman with her sheep and her beloved black horse; a young guy, a traveling bard who came from nowhere,but he has a lot of stories from different places.
creator: Cosmostars
